title: Tangy Croatian Cheese Flatbread
description: A cozy, tangy flatbread packed with mozzarella, feta, dark brown sugar, dill pickles, and Mediterranean herbs, baked to gooey perfection.
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together flour, yeast, and salt.
Add warm water and olive oil, then stir until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead on a floured surface for 5‑7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let rise for 20 minutes or until doubled in size.
Meanwhile, combine shredded mozzarella, crumbled feta, dark brown sugar, oregano, red pepper flakes, and lemon zest in a mixing bowl.
After the dough has risen, divide it into two equal portions and roll each into a 30 cm circle on a parchment‑lined baking sheet.
Preheat the oven to 220 °C (425 °F). Spread the cheese‑sugar mixture evenly over each dough circle.
Top with diced pickles, sun‑dried tomatoes, and sliced olives.
Bake for 12‑15 minutes until the edges are golden and the cheese is bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 3 minutes before slicing.
Garnish with fresh basil leaves, drizzle a little extra‑virgin olive oil, and serve warm.
